content.text:
Now I have a clear view of atom C:22 in the molecule. Looking at the image, I can see atom C:22 (carbon, index 22) is connected to:

- C:19 (carbon, index 19) - bond visible
- C:27 (carbon, index 27) - bond visible
- H:23 (hydrogen, index 23) - bond visible
- H:28 (hydrogen, index 28) - bond visible

From the image, I can confirm that atom C:22 has exactly 4 covalent bonds: two to carbon atoms (C:19 and C:27) and two to hydrogen atoms (H:23 and H:28).

Regarding the geomconf_index, based on the file name "geomconf_661.xyz", the geomconf_index for this molecule is 661.

So the neighbor atoms of atom C:22 are:
- Atom index 19, element C
- Atom index 27, element C  
- Atom index 23, element H
- Atom index 28, element H

And the geomconf_index is 661.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 22, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
